title: How do I find and then bookmark a group so I can go directly to it later?

posts.author: mats.svensson (Mats Svensson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need a bookmarkable URL to a page with a list of all groups,
a way to search for a group by name, and a bookmarkable URL to each group so I can go directly to it later or give that link to someone.

Right now there seems to be no way to do any of these things?
It makes it ridiculously time consuming to do a simple thing like crating new item.
Just finding the place to create it, takes longer time than all other steps.
